case_title: ALLIED PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CHRISTINA CHEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-16-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
